title: Alisia (Human)
content:

{{Quote|Enjoy the show. The band is playing a cover of a popular song from Tatooine.|Mira T'rani|<ref name="SWG:TPS" />}}
'''Alisia''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Musician/Legends|musician]] who performed with [[Alitra]], [[O'choa Detera]], [[Mako (musician)|Mako]], and [[Mestral]] in the [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]] aboard both [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] and [[Nova Orion Station]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During her time with the [[Unidentified Bright Jewel system band|band]], Alisia played the musical instrument known as the [[Bandfill/Legends|bandfill]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|These guys also perform over at Tansarii Point Station, but since I can't go there any more, I'm glad they come here as well.|A Nova Orion Industries employee|<ref name="SWG:NOS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|Nova Orion Station}}</ref>}}
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] by the name of Alisia participated in a [[Unidentified Bright Jewel system band|band]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] along with two other [[Musician/Legends|musicians]], a Human named [[Mako (musician)|Mako]], and a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] named [[Alitra]]. Her [[Band/Legends|band]] also comprised of two [[Entertainer|dancers]], a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] named [[Mestral]], and a Zabrak named [[O'choa Detera]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Alisia and her band played [[Music/Legends|music]] and danced for the patrons of the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] owned by a Twi'lek named [[Tiarsis]] in the [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. As part of the band, Alisia played the musical instrument known as the [[Bandfill/Legends|bandfill]]. The Twi'lek entertainer [[Mira T'rani]] enjoyed the performance of Alisia's band, which featured two popular songs from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> played by [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes]],<ref name="Slugthrowers">{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref> [[Mad About Me/Legends|"Mad About Me"]] and [[Dune Sea Special/Legends|"Dune Sea Special"]].<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

Alisia and her band also divided their time at another space station in the Bright Jewel system known as [[Nova Orion Station]]. In addition to the music they played on Tansarii Point Station, Alisia and her band also played two other cover songs<ref name="SWG:NOS" /> belonging to [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]],<ref name="Slugthrowers" /> including a [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] song named [[Lapti Nek/Legends|"Lapti Nek"]]. Despite the band's skill at playing these songs, their lack of original material drew criticism from at least one [[Nova Orion Industries]] employee frequenting the cantina.<ref name="SWG:NOS" />

==Personality and traits==
[[File:TansariiBand.jpg|250px|thumb|Alisia playing with her band on Tansarii Point Station]]
{{Quote|This band is pretty good, but they only play covers of other people's music. Seems like kind of short-sighted. I'll stay for one more song, but I'm not coming back until they learn something new.|A critical Nova Orion Industries employee|<ref name="SWG:NOS" />}}
Alisia had dark skin, brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and amber [[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. She was skilled at using the bandfill to play songs such as "Mad About Me" and "Dune Sea Special".<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

==Equipment==
As a band member at the cantinas of both Tansarii Point Station and Nova Orion Station, Alisia wore revealing [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]], including a yellow and white [[Shirt|low cut top]], yellow and white hawtpants, and yellow dress slippers. She also wore a yellow hairband to keep a ponytail. As a talented musician, Alisia also possessed and used a musical instrument known as a bandfill.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Alisia was a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Alisia and her band were added to the game with the release of [[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25's]] "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]" on [[November 15]], [[2005]],<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> which included a" [[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]" featuring [[W:c:swg:Tansarii Point Station|Tansarii Point Station]].<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> She could be found in the station's [[W:c:swg:Cantina|cantina]] playing music with her band.<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> With the release of "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 8 Notes for Jan 15 2008|Chapter 8: The Nova Orion Crisis]]" on [[January 15]], [[2008]],<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter 8: The Nova Orion Crisis">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67563&month=012008|text=Chapter 8: The Nova Orion Crisis}}</ref> Alisia and her band were also included in the cantina of [[W:c:swg:Nova Orion Station|Nova Orion Station]].<ref name="SWG:NOS" />
